overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment or clinic with large windows overlooking a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player moves from a narrow corridor into a main room with medical equipment and NPCs, then into a back office area. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring atmospheric neon lighting and detailed urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow corridor illuminated by red emergency lighting. The camera moves forward toward a window with horizontal blinds, revealing a glimpse of a massive cyberpunk cityscape outside. The walls are bare concrete and a metal mesh security door is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: main room with panoramic city view and medical equipment

events.description: NPC comes into view standing by the window looking out at the city

agents.ego_description: turning right into main room and approaching the large windows to observe the city

red illuminated medical examination chair with armrests
giant holographic advertisements and corporate logos on distant buildings
elevated highway ramps with moving vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: Entering the main room from the corridor, the space opens into a large area with floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a stunning cyberpunk cityscape at dusk. A medical chair with red lighting sits to the right. An NPC stands by the window looking out at the neon-lit skyscrapers and highway interchange below.

scene_state.functional_zone: clinic main floor with holographic displays and city overlook

events.description: second NPC comes into view near cardboard boxes by the window
camera pans down to focus on highway traffic moving below

agents.ego_description: panning across the room to observe interior details, NPCs, and traffic on the highway below

man standing by window looking out at city

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the main room revealing holographic displays floating from the ceiling and a wall with colorful graffiti. A second NPC, a woman, stands leaning against cardboard boxes. The view shifts to look down at the highway traffic moving below, then pans to show a mattress on the floor and scattered papers.

scene_state.functional_zone: back office room with computer workstations

events.description: moving through red-lit doorway into back office area
third NPC seen sitting in office chair using a device

doorway framed with red neon light tubes

segments.scene_description: Moving through a doorway framed with red neon lights, the scene transitions to a back office area with computer workstations. A man sits in a chair looking at a device. The room contains server racks, multiple monitors displaying data, and windows showing the cityscape to the left. The camera explores this smaller, more enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit corridor into an expansive medical suite and finally into a cluttered technical office. It begins in a narrow concrete hallway bathed in red emergency lighting, moving past a metal mesh security door toward a window with horizontal blinds that offers a first glimpse of a massive cyberpunk city. As the camera enters the main room, the space opens dramatically into a large area with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking neon-lit skyscrapers and a highway interchange at dusk, passing a red-lit medical chair and an NPC gazing at the skyline. The view then pans across holographic displays and graffiti-covered walls, shifting from the distant traffic below to a mattress and scattered papers on the floor. Finally, the camera moves through a red neon-framed doorway into a more enclosed back office, exploring a space filled with server racks, data monitors, and a man seated at a workstation.
